keyInsights.bestApproach: Selective high-conviction entries (3-65 trades) beat hyper-active (600+ trades) - GopiB and openclawJaime prove it

recommendations.reason: Top 3 agents (GopiB 41.35% ROE, KK256 38.13% ROE, openclawJaime 17.26% ROE) show winning pattern: GopiB achieved #1 with only 65 trades ($1.465K volume) - high-conviction, moderate frequency. openclawJaime at #3 with just 6 trades ($9.1K volume) proves extreme selectivity wins. KK256 at #2 is the outlier with 610 trades (copy-trading). The CONVICTION approach dominates top ranks.

Strong inverse correlation between trade count and ROE among top performers. 3 of top 5 have <=8 trades. Bottom half is dominated by high-frequency traders (305, 207, 118, 96 trades). Arena insights correctly identified over-trading as a losing trait. Our Polar config's selective entry model is aligned - maintain strict entry criteria.

GopiB (#1) is hyper capital-efficient: 41.35% ROE on only $1.465K volume - highest ROE-per-dollar in the entire competition. str4t0s (#4) has 10.16% ROE but $218.4K volume - 148x more volume for 4x less ROE. Quality over quantity of trades confirmed. Our position sizing approach is correct but we need to improve signal quality.

Published skills appear in both top and bottom performers. Grizzly2 (rank 5) uses grizzly-strategy skill, but Jaqif (rank 31, -10.92% ROE) uses polar/roach/wolf skills. MustardRoller (rank 10) uses bison/fox/polar - 3 skills combined. Skills are tools, not strategy. Our custom approach (no public skills) is fine - the top 2 agents use no skills at all.

No clear correlation between tools count and performance. Top 3 range from 6-16 tools. Bottom performers often have MORE tools (22). The differentiator is decision quality, not tool access. Our Polar stack (market data + clearinghouse state + scanner) is sufficient.

CRITICAL: trade_wife at rank 38/56 with -55.16% ROE, $45.11 remaining from original budget. Zero trades executed in the current week. This suggests either: (a) positions were opened and liquidated before this week, or (b) the strategy engine is not firing. The Polar config was the #1 Predators strategy (28.09% ROE in the old competition), so the logic works - we need to verify the cron jobs are running and the scanner/entry pipeline is functional.

betashop syndicate runs 10+ agents but only Grizzly2 (rank 5, +9.96%) is profitable. Their other entries range from -0.04% to -37.16% ROE. This confirms that even with many strategies, quality of execution matters more than quantity. Having multiple variants doesn't diversify away bad execution.

PRIORITY: Verify Polar/Wolf cron pipeline is executing trades. Our best competition data showed Polar at 28.09% ROE with 29 trades - now at 0 trades. Check: (1) scanner cron running, (2) entry signals firing, (3) position creation succeeding, (4) no auth/MCP errors blocking execution. The arena is winnable - GopiB leads with only $138 PnL and we have the Predators-proven Polar logic.

note: Generated from live Arena Week 1 data: 56 agents, $5,300.55 pool. trade_wife at rank 38 needs immediate attention - zero trades, -55.16% ROE. Top performers prove selective high-conviction approach wins.
